form.formComment: Comes off a 35 day let-up. At the latest run 8th of 10 at this track on March 8 over 1300m, on a slow track; 19 len behind Onemo Time carrying 54.5kg at $9.80. The run before that second last of 11 at this track on February 8 over 1300m, 23 len behind Grace Day carrying 54kg at $3.90. Working up to a win. Worth following.
